2022_00_9_000.description_claire: Renovation of the Charlotte Delbo Library staircase.
2022_00_9_000.quoi_concretement: Full refurbishment of the building's stairwell. The works will renew the steps and walls to improve the welcome of the public.
2022_00_9_000.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves user safety and comfort when moving around the library.

2022_00_9_001.description_claire: Transformation of the primary-school yard into a planted, safer space.
2022_00_9_001.quoi_concretement: An Oasis schoolyard with more vegetation and permeable surfaces. Safety works are also carried out in the building to protect pupils.
2022_00_9_001.pourquoi_ca_compte: Children get a cooler play area in summer and a setting better suited to biodiversity.

2022_00_9_002.description_claire: Oasis schoolyard at the rue Saint-Louis-en-l'Île primary school.
2022_00_9_002.quoi_concretement: Tarmac is replaced with natural materials and trees are planted. The renovation manages rainwater better and reduces heat.
2022_00_9_002.pourquoi_ca_compte: A more natural, calmer setting for pupils during their breaks.

2022_00_9_003.description_claire: Window replacement and a planted yard at the primary school.
2022_00_9_003.quoi_concretement: The works include outer-frame replacement for better insulation. The yard is also turned into an Oasis with new planting.
2022_00_9_003.pourquoi_ca_compte: Pupils enjoy better thermal insulation in classrooms and a cooler yard.

2022_00_9_004.description_claire: Full renovation of the toilets in the nursery school's outdoor yard.
2022_00_9_004.quoi_concretement: Modernisation of the outdoor sanitary facilities. Old equipment is replaced to ensure better hygiene for young children.
2022_00_9_004.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves daily comfort and hygiene for nursery-age pupils.

2022_00_9_005.description_claire: Modernisation of the school canteen and safety upgrade of the school.
2022_00_9_005.quoi_concretement: Bringing the catering service up to standard. Safety works are also carried out across the school building.
2022_00_9_005.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures a safer setting and meals prepared in good conditions.

2022_00_9_006.description_claire: Floor refurbishment and accessible toilets at Square Louis XIII.
2022_00_9_006.quoi_concretement: The square's surfacing is refurbished to make walking easier. Disabled-access toilets are also installed on site.
2022_00_9_006.pourquoi_ca_compte: The square becomes more accessible and comfortable for all visitors, including disabled people.

2022_00_9_007.description_claire: Tree and plant planting along Boulevard Bourdon.
2022_00_9_007.quoi_concretement: An urban-greening operation creating an ecological corridor. New plants and shrubs are installed to bring more nature into the city.
2022_00_9_007.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves residents' surroundings and helps fight urban heat islands.

2022_00_9_008.description_claire: Reshaping rue du Temple to share public space better.
2022_00_9_008.quoi_concretement: Roadway redesign. The street layout is changed to share space more evenly between users, especially pedestrians.
2022_00_9_008.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves pedestrian comfort and safety in the Marais quarter.

2022_00_9_009.quoi_concretement: Full roadway refurbishment. Worn tarmac is replaced for smoother traffic and quieter rolling.
2022_00_9_009.pourquoi_ca_compte: Smoother traffic and less noise for residents.

2022_00_9_010.description_claire: Roadway resurfacing at Place André Malraux.
2022_00_9_010.quoi_concretement: Roadway refurbishment on the square. Damaged surfacing is replaced to stabilise the ground and improve the square's condition.
2022_00_9_010.pourquoi_ca_compte: Safer and more comfortable circulation on this busy square.

2022_00_9_011.description_claire: Redevelopment of rue de la Verrerie to ease movement.
2022_00_9_011.quoi_concretement: Roadway works. The street's configuration is modified to make pedestrian travel safer and easier.
2022_00_9_011.pourquoi_ca_compte: Makes the street more pleasant and safer for residents and passers-by.

2022_00_9_012.description_claire: Modernisation and safety upgrade of the rue Rambuteau day-care.
2022_00_9_012.quoi_concretement: Restructuring the day-care premises. The works include a safety bring-up-to-standard for welcoming young children.
2022_00_9_012.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a safer, better-suited setting for toddlers and early-childhood staff.

2022_00_9_013.description_claire: Yard and garden upgrade at the rue des Barres school.
2022_00_9_013.quoi_concretement: Yard and outdoor-garden redevelopment. The project refurbishes the surfaces and enhances the school's green spaces.
2022_00_9_013.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better setting and more nature for the children at school.

2022_00_9_014.description_claire: Partial renovation of the rue des Blancs Manteaux school.
2022_00_9_014.quoi_concretement: Partial structural restructuring of the school building. Some interior spaces are upgraded to better fit pupils' needs.
2022_00_9_014.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves welcome and learning conditions for pupils in the area.

2022_00_9_015.description_claire: Parquet renovation and toilet creation at Jean Dame Sports Centre.
2022_00_9_015.quoi_concretement: Full renovation of the sports-hall parquet and creation of new toilet blocks to maintain the equipment's quality.
2022_00_9_015.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better hygiene and practice conditions for athletes and local clubs.

2022_00_9_016.quoi_concretement: Renovation works to reduce noise and echo inside the sports hall.
2022_00_9_016.pourquoi_ca_compte: More comfortable acoustics for athletes and pupils using the facility.

2022_00_9_017.description_claire: Restoration of the main entrance of Saint-Eustache Church.
2022_00_9_017.quoi_concretement: Renovation works on the entrance facade and various consolidation works on the historic building.
2022_00_9_017.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the historic heritage and ensures visitor safety at this landmark.

2022_00_9_018.description_claire: Roof and facade renovation of Saint-Louis-en-l'Île Church.
2022_00_9_018.quoi_concretement: Roof refurbishment for water-tightness and facade refurbishment to protect the stonework.
2022_00_9_018.pourquoi_ca_compte: Long-term upkeep of a central-Paris historic monument for future generations.

2022_00_9_019.description_claire: Restoration of the bell tower and part of Saint-Gervais Church.
2022_00_9_019.quoi_concretement: Technical renovation of the bell tower and the north arm of the transept to stabilise and beautify the structure.
2022_00_9_019.pourquoi_ca_compte: Safeguards the architectural heritage of the 4th district.

2022_00_9_020.description_claire: Restoration of the main facade of the Temple des Billettes.
2022_00_9_020.quoi_concretement: Cleaning and stone repair on the street-facing facade to restore the building's appearance.
2022_00_9_020.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves the look of the area and preserves a historic place of worship.

2022_00_9_021.description_claire: Tree planting and green-space creation on Boulevard Bourdon.
2022_00_9_021.quoi_concretement: New planted areas and greening of the public space to reduce city heat.
2022_00_9_021.pourquoi_ca_compte: A more pleasant, cooler setting for the boulevard's residents.

2022_00_9_022.description_claire: Full modernisation of Saint-Merri Swimming Pool.
2022_00_9_022.quoi_concretement: Restructuring of the pools and changing rooms to improve welcome and hygiene at the facility.
2022_00_9_022.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides Paris swimmers with a more modern and comfortable sports facility.

2022_00_9_023.description_claire: Renovation of the rue Saint-Roch municipal health centre.
2022_00_9_023.quoi_concretement: Internal restructuring to modernise the reception areas and consultation rooms.
2022_00_9_023.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves access to care and patient comfort in the 1st district.

2022_00_9_025.description_claire: Full renovation of the Niki de Saint Phalle monumental fountain.
2022_00_9_025.quoi_concretement: Restoration of the sculptures and overhaul of the hydraulic system. Cleaning, mechanism repair and protection of the artworks.
2022_00_9_025.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves an iconic Paris-heritage artwork and beautifies the public space.

2022_00_9_026.description_claire: Extension of the Charlotte Delbo Library reading areas.
2022_00_9_026.quoi_concretement: Enlarging the library's floor area to create new reading zones. Includes interior fit-out and new furniture.
2022_00_9_026.pourquoi_ca_compte: Users will have more seats and better comfort to read, work or meet.

2022_00_9_027.description_claire: Conversion of the École des Tournelles attic into usable rooms.
2022_00_9_027.quoi_concretement: The attic is converted to create extra space. Works include insulation, electrics and floor and wall refurbishment.
2022_00_9_027.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides more room for pupils and teachers within the school.

2022_00_9_028.description_claire: Adapting the city to the effects of climate change.
2022_00_9_028.quoi_concretement: Funds installations to reduce urban heat, such as planting and use of less heat-absorbent materials. Public-space transformation works.
2022_00_9_028.pourquoi_ca_compte: Helps make the city more breathable and comfortable during heatwaves.

2022_00_9_029.description_claire: Heritage restoration of the Molière fountain.
2022_00_9_029.quoi_concretement: Stone cleaning, sculpture repair and restart of the water circuit. A full renovation of this historic structure.
2022_00_9_029.pourquoi_ca_compte: Safeguards a major historic monument and improves the area's setting.

2022_00_9_030.description_claire: New equipment to clean the streets of Paris.
2022_00_9_030.quoi_concretement: The City invests in higher-performing cleaning vehicles and collection equipment, replacing older tools with more efficient and quieter models.
2022_00_9_030.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures cleaner streets and reduces noise for residents.

2022_00_9_031.description_claire: Modernisation of water management and distribution systems.
2022_00_9_031.quoi_concretement: Pipe replacement and installation of more accurate monitoring tools. The aim is to track consumption and limit leaks.
2022_00_9_031.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better management preserves water resources and reduces waste city-wide.

2022_00_9_032.description_claire: Creation and fit-out of new solidarity venues.
2022_00_9_032.quoi_concretement: Renovation or acquisition of premises to help people in need. The works bring these social-support spaces up to standard and equip them.
2022_00_9_032.pourquoi_ca_compte: These places provide concrete support and local help to the most vulnerable citizens.

2022_00_9_033.description_claire: Plant installation on the walls and roofs of Saint-Merri and Renard schools.
2022_00_9_033.quoi_concretement: Greening of facades and roofs. Includes planter supports and automatic irrigation systems.
2022_00_9_033.pourquoi_ca_compte: Brings cooler air to the schoolyards and improves natural insulation of school buildings.

2022_05_12_001.description_claire: Renovation and modernisation of the rue Victor Cousin primary-school covered playground.
2022_05_12_001.quoi_concretement: Refurbishment of the covered playground to make it more modern. The shelter structures are renovated to improve children's comfort during breaks.
2022_05_12_001.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides pupils with a sheltered, more welcoming play area whatever the weather.

2022_05_12_003.description_claire: Safety and accessibility upgrade of the Capitant Hall.
2022_05_12_003.quoi_concretement: Hall restoration to meet safety rules and ease access for people with reduced mobility. The works modernise this meeting space.
2022_05_12_003.pourquoi_ca_compte: Enables all residents to access this public meeting place easily and safely.

2022_05_12_004.quoi_concretement: Installation of a green wall on a street wall. Various plant species are planted to green the public space.
2022_05_12_004.pourquoi_ca_compte: Beautifies the area and fights urban heat for the comfort of passers-by and residents.

2022_05_12_005.description_claire: Repair of part of the floor surfaces in Tino Rossi Garden.
2022_05_12_005.quoi_concretement: Renovation of walkways and walking surfaces. The aim is to replace damaged sections to ensure smooth, safe circulation.
2022_05_12_005.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures the safety of walkers and improves enjoyment in this Seine-side garden.

2022_05_12_006.description_claire: Window replacement and bottle-room renovation at the rue Censier day-care.
2022_05_12_006.quoi_concretement: Window replacement for better thermal insulation. Includes the full renovation of the bottle-preparation room.
2022_05_12_006.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better comfort for the children and impeccable hygiene for meal preparation.

2022_05_12_007.description_claire: Window and door replacement at the rue Jean Calvin day-care.
2022_05_12_007.quoi_concretement: Higher-performance windows and doors are installed to limit heat loss. The works also improve sound insulation against street noise.
2022_05_12_007.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures a comfortable temperature and quieter conditions for young children to sleep and play.

2022_05_12_008.description_claire: Insulation and ventilation upgrade of a public building.
2022_05_12_008.quoi_concretement: Energy-efficiency renovation to retain heat better and ensure good air renewal. Includes insulation and technical upgrades.
2022_05_12_008.pourquoi_ca_compte: Cuts energy bills and provides cleaner air for building users.

2022_05_12_009.description_claire: Maintenance and repair works on Boulevard Saint-Marcel.
2022_05_12_009.quoi_concretement: Various works on the roadway and pavements to maintain the road's condition. Spot repairs ensure user safety.
2022_05_12_009.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures safe, smooth traffic on this major 5th-district route.

2022_05_12_010.description_claire: Resurfacing of the bus lane on Boulevard de Port-Royal.
2022_05_12_010.quoi_concretement: Full refurbishment of the bus-only lane to correct ground deformations. Stabilises the road subjected to heavy-vehicle traffic.
2022_05_12_010.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves passenger comfort and bus-line reliability.

2022_05_12_011.description_claire: Repair of several damaged pavements in the 5th district.
2022_05_12_011.quoi_concretement: Pavement refurbishment works to remove holes and bumps. The works target the most damaged areas to make walking easier.
2022_05_12_011.pourquoi_ca_compte: Makes pedestrian travel safer and pavements more accessible.

2022_05_12_012.description_claire: Modernisation of kitchen equipment in two area colleges.
2022_05_12_012.quoi_concretement: Replacement of cooking and meal-prep equipment at Pierre Alviset and Raymond Queneau colleges. Installations are renewed to meet the latest hygiene standards.
2022_05_12_012.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures quality, safe school catering for pupils.

2022_05_12_013.description_claire: Works to make the town hall more accessible and secure.
2022_05_12_013.quoi_concretement: Disabled-access equipment and safety-system upgrades. The administrative building is brought up to current public-welcome standards.
2022_05_12_013.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures all citizens can access town-hall services safely.

2022_05_12_014.description_claire: Full renovation of the historic rue de Pontoise swimming pool.
2022_05_12_014.quoi_concretement: Restoration of the structure, pools and changing rooms. The project also modernises the filtration and heating systems for better energy performance.
2022_05_12_014.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a modern sports facility while preserving an iconic local landmark.

2022_05_12_016.description_claire: Equipment purchases to improve street cleanliness.
2022_05_12_016.quoi_concretement: Acquisition of new cleaning machines and additional street bins. These investments boost the district's public-space upkeep.
2022_05_12_016.pourquoi_ca_compte: Makes streets cleaner and more pleasant for everyone.

2022_05_12_017.description_claire: Renovation and modernisation of the École Arbalète schoolyard.
2022_05_12_017.quoi_concretement: Transformation of the play area with new surfaces and play features. The works provide a more welcoming environment better suited to children's activities.
2022_05_12_017.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves the school setting and pupil well-being during breaks.

2022_06_15_000.description_claire: Renovation of the outer parts of a municipal building.
2022_06_15_000.quoi_concretement: Refurbishment or modernisation of the facades or external areas of a public facility.
2022_06_15_000.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves the overall condition and look of local facilities for users.

2022_06_15_001.description_claire: Renovation of toilets in a public facility.
2022_06_15_001.quoi_concretement: Replacement or modernisation of toilets and plumbing equipment to improve hygiene and comfort.
2022_06_15_001.pourquoi_ca_compte: Ensures better welcome and hygiene for Parisians using this facility.

2024_18_51_021.description_claire: Porte de la Chapelle redevelopment for the 2024 Olympics.
2024_18_51_021.quoi_concretement: A full redesign of the roadway and public spaces. The project includes new cycle lanes, wider pavements and tree planting.
2024_18_51_021.pourquoi_ca_compte: The area becomes greener and easier to cross on foot or by bike for residents.

2024_18_51_019.description_claire: New municipal swimming pool on rue Belliard.
2024_18_51_019.quoi_concretement: A major project to build a complete new aquatic centre. It will include several pools and modern spaces for swimmers and pupils.
2024_18_51_019.pourquoi_ca_compte: A new place for swimming and learning to swim, accessible to all 18th-district residents.

2023_18_51_023.description_claire: New large sports and entertainment arena at Porte de la Chapelle.
2023_18_51_023.quoi_concretement: Construction of a high-capacity multi-sport venue. The building is designed to host international competitions and cultural events.
2023_18_51_023.pourquoi_ca_compte: A high-level venue for sport and culture in northern Paris.

2024_18_51_020.description_claire: Redesign of the road axis between Porte de la Chapelle and rue Marx Dormoy.
2024_18_51_020.quoi_concretement: Roadway and pavement renovation along this major route. The project aims to organise traffic better and beautify the surrounding public space.
2024_18_51_020.pourquoi_ca_compte: Transforms the northern entrance of Paris, making it more pleasant and better shared between users.

2023_18_51_028.description_claire: Transformation of public spaces and roadway at Porte de la Chapelle.
2023_18_51_028.quoi_concretement: A full roadway renovation with wide cycle lanes and enlarged pavements. Tree planting is also planned to green the area.
2023_18_51_028.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves residents' quality of life and supports soft mobility.

2024_16_45_019.description_claire: Full redevelopment of Place de la Porte Maillot.
2024_16_45_019.quoi_concretement: The square is reshaped with new circulation routes. The project includes tree planting, wider pavements and protected cycle lanes.
2024_16_45_019.pourquoi_ca_compte: Eases travel and makes this major junction more pleasant and accessible for all users.

2022_17_52_019.description_claire: Full transformation of Place de la Porte Maillot.
2022_17_52_019.quoi_concretement: Traffic reorganisation, large pedestrian areas and extensive tree planting. The project turns this road junction into a more welcoming urban square.
2022_17_52_019.pourquoi_ca_compte: Better connection between Paris and Neuilly and a more breathable setting for residents.

2024_19_54_014.description_claire: New major cultural facility on Avenue Jean Jaurès.
2024_19_54_014.quoi_concretement: Construction and fit-out of a modern multimedia library. The project includes reading areas, digital zones and meeting spaces.
2024_19_54_014.pourquoi_ca_compte: New free access to culture, information and digital tools for the entire district.

2023_19_54_016.description_claire: New cultural hub combining a multimedia library and a reception centre.
2023_19_54_016.quoi_concretement: A new building that will house the James Baldwin Library and the Refugee Centre. It will offer reading and working spaces and social-support services.
2023_19_54_016.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides residents easier access to culture and strengthens solidarity in the district.

2022_09_24_010.description_claire: Restoration of the entrance facade of La Trinité Church.
2022_09_24_010.quoi_concretement: Full renovation of the entrance, including stone cleaning and structural consolidation. The aim is to preserve this major historic landmark.
2022_09_24_010.pourquoi_ca_compte: Safeguards the area's architectural beauty and protects passers-by from falling stones.

2024_20_57_022.description_claire: Major redevelopment of Place de la Porte de Montreuil.
2024_20_57_022.quoi_concretement: A large urban project that reshapes the square to reduce car space. Works include new pedestrian areas, cycle lanes and large-scale tree planting.
2024_20_57_022.pourquoi_ca_compte: Creates a more breathable, safer and more enjoyable public space for residents and passers-by.

2023_05_12_023.description_claire: Energy-efficiency renovation of a public building.
2023_05_12_023.quoi_concretement: Wall insulation, window replacement or heating modernisation to cut energy consumption. The aim is to improve thermal comfort.
2023_05_12_023.pourquoi_ca_compte: Reduces the city's ecological footprint and improves user comfort while saving energy.

2022_19_59_018.description_claire: New reception and support centre for refugees.
2022_19_59_018.quoi_concretement: Fit-out of a building dedicated to welcoming and orienting refugees. The site offers social-support services, legal advice and integration activities.
2022_19_59_018.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a dignified, centralised welcome point to ease the integration of refugees.

2022_13_38_015.description_claire: Modernisation of the canteen at Baudricourt Primary School.
2022_13_38_015.quoi_concretement: Full renovation of the kitchen and dining hall. Equipment is replaced to improve meal preparation and the acoustic and thermal comfort of pupils.
2022_13_38_015.pourquoi_ca_compte: Improves the quality of mealtimes and pupils' well-being at school.

2023_20_57_020.description_claire: Extension of the Davout Primary School with ten new classrooms.
2023_20_57_020.quoi_concretement: Construction of an extension to the school building to accommodate ten new classrooms. The project increases the school's capacity.
2023_20_57_020.pourquoi_ca_compte: Welcomes more pupils in better learning conditions.

2022_20_62_033.description_claire: Ten new classrooms at the Boulevard Davout school.
2022_20_62_033.quoi_concretement: Construction of an extension or fit-out of new premises to add ten classrooms. The project expands the school's capacity.
2022_20_62_033.pourquoi_ca_compte: Meets families' needs by creating new school places in the area.

2024_09_24_013.description_claire: Restoration of the entrance facade of La Trinité Church.
2024_09_24_013.quoi_concretement: Major renovation works on the structure and stones of the entrance. The aim is to consolidate the building and restore its original appearance.
2024_09_24_013.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves an iconic historic monument of the 9th district.

2023_00_9_031.description_claire: Restoration of the entrance facade of Saint-Eustache Church.
2023_00_9_031.quoi_concretement: Renovation of the main facade, including stone cleaning and repair of carved features. The aim is to restore the monumental entrance.
2023_00_9_031.pourquoi_ca_compte: Highlights an iconic central-Paris monument and ensures its long-term preservation.

2024_13_36_014.description_claire: Structural consolidation works at Sainte-Anne Church.
2024_13_36_014.quoi_concretement: Major renovation to stabilise the building and ensure long-term solidity. Works mainly target the foundations and load-bearing elements of this historic structure.
2024_13_36_014.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves an iconic historic monument and a community gathering place in the area.

2023_20_57_022.description_claire: Creation of the new Python-Duvernois park at Porte de Bagnolet.
2023_20_57_022.quoi_concretement: A large new green space is created as part of the area's urban renewal. Includes planting, walkways and rest zones.
2023_20_57_022.pourquoi_ca_compte: Brings more nature and cooler air to residents in a fast-changing area.

2024_20_57_018.description_claire: New day-care in the Paul Meurice sector at Porte des Lilas.
2024_20_57_018.quoi_concretement: Construction of a new building dedicated to welcoming young children. The project includes suitable play, rest and meal areas.
2024_20_57_018.pourquoi_ca_compte: Strengthens day-care provision in a fast-developing area.

2023_13_36_027.description_claire: Consolidation works at Sainte-Anne de la Butte-aux-Cailles Church.
2023_13_36_027.quoi_concretement: Structural renovation works to ensure the building's long-term solidity. The interventions stabilise the building to prevent any major deterioration.
2023_13_36_027.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves the area's historic heritage and ensures public safety.

2023_09_24_019.description_claire: Renovation of the main entrance of La Sainte-Trinité Church.
2023_09_24_019.quoi_concretement: Restoration works on the entrance facade. The works refurbish the structures and facades of this historic part to ensure its preservation.
2023_09_24_019.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves an iconic local monument and ensures the safety of passers-by and visitors.

2023_14_39_019.description_claire: New school in the Saint-Vincent-de-Paul quarter.
2023_14_39_019.quoi_concretement: Construction of a new school building to welcome local pupils. It will include several modern classrooms.
2023_14_39_019.pourquoi_ca_compte: A new local school option for families settling into this new sector.

2022_08_21_015.description_claire: Restoration of the facades of La Madeleine Church.
2022_08_21_015.quoi_concretement: Cleaning and full repair of the building's outer walls. These renovation works preserve the stone and historic sculptures from wear and tear.
2022_08_21_015.pourquoi_ca_compte: Preserves and showcases an iconic Paris-heritage monument.

2024_20_57_015.description_claire: New large public park in the Python-Duvernois quarter.
2024_20_57_015.quoi_concretement: A vast green space is created with tree planting, lawns and walkways. The project turns former tarmac areas into a natural zone.
2024_20_57_015.pourquoi_ca_compte: Provides a green lung and a relaxing space for residents of a fast-changing area.

2023_13_36_029.description_claire: Renovation of the kitchen and canteen at Baudricourt Primary School.
2023_13_36_029.quoi_concretement: Modernisation of kitchen equipment and redesign of the dining hall. The space is rethought to be more functional and welcoming for children.
2023_13_36_029.pourquoi_ca_compte: Pupils enjoy a more pleasant, higher-quality setting at lunchtime.

2024_15_42_015.description_claire: Refurbishment of the Grand Canal at Parc André Citroën.
2024_15_42_015.quoi_concretement: Works on water-tightness and technical refurbishment of the central pool. The intervention restores the hydraulic operation and aesthetics of this ornamental water feature.
2024_15_42_015.pourquoi_ca_compte: Maintains the appeal of this iconic walking spot for Parisians.
